stories.title: Full list of every ESPYS 2026 Award winner
stories.summary: From Jalen Brunson to A'ja Wilson, see which athletes won at the 2026 ESPYS.

stories.title: Messi, Argentina stun England late to reach final
stories.summary: Argentina sealed a dramatic semifinal comeback against England at Mercedes-Benz Stadium with two goals in the final five minutes to clinch a 2-1 win and book a World Cup final clash with Spain on Sunday.

stories.title: Messi: Win over England meant most to our fans
stories.summary: Lionel Messi set up two goals in the dying minutes of Argentina's semifinal against England at Mercedes-Benz Stadium on Wednesday to snatch a 2-1 win and a spot in the final Sunday against Spain.

stories.title: Tuchel vows to stay England boss, defends tactics
stories.summary: Thomas Tuchel vowed to stay on as England boss until Euro 2028 and defended his tactical adjustments in their World Cup semifinal loss to Argentina.

stories.title: Clark: Missed call means playing with leg contusio...
stories.summary: Caitlin Clark was frustrated by a non-call midway through the second quarter Wednesday night and sounded off after the Fever's 88-75 loss to the Valkyries.
